title: Sea-Kissed Edwardian Villa in the Heart of Devonport
description: Wrapped in established hydrangeas and a short stroll from Cheltenham Beach, this 1910 villa blends period charm — leadlights, soaring ceilings and polished rimu floors — with a sun-soaked modern kitchen and a deck built for long summer evenings. The ferry to the city is ten minutes on foot, a rare blend of village calm and downtown convenience.

title: Stylish Inner-City Apartment with Skyline Views in Te Aro
description: Perched high above Courtenay Place, this one-bedroom apartment makes the most of floor-to-ceiling glass with the city lights as your backdrop. A secure building, lift access and a smart open-plan layout make it an easy lock-up-and-leave for professionals who want Wellington's bars, theatres and galleries on the doorstep.

title: Near-New Townhouse Footsteps from Riccarton's Bustle
description: Low-maintenance and beautifully finished, this three-bedroom townhouse pairs a stone-bench kitchen with a sunny, fully-fenced courtyard. Double glazing and a heat pump keep it warm year-round, and you're moments from Westfield Riccarton, Hagley Park and the university — ideal for families or savvy investors.

title: Sunny Family Home a Short Walk from Papamoa Beach
description: Set on a quiet street just back from the dunes, this four-bedroom home offers open-plan living that opens to a north-facing deck and level lawn. With a double garage, heat pump and room for the whole family, it's beachside living without compromise — bring the boards and the boat.

title: Character Bungalow on a Leafy Cambridge Section
description: A white picket fence and a wraparound veranda set the tone for this lovingly maintained bungalow, where original sash windows meet a tastefully updated kitchen and bathroom. The deep, tree-lined section has space for a vege garden and trampoline, and the town's cafes and the Avantidrome are minutes away.

title: Double Room in a Warm, Friendly Mount Eden Villa
description: A sunny double room in a freshly renovated character villa, sharing with two easy-going professionals. The room is part-furnished with a double bed and wardrobe, and you'll enjoy a modern shared kitchen, a log burner and a leafy back garden. Two minutes' walk to Mount Eden village cafes and the train.

title: Alpine-View Apartment Moments from Queenstown's Waterfront
description: Wake to uninterrupted views of the Remarkables from this immaculate two-bedroom apartment, where a sleek open-plan living area spills onto a sun-drenched balcony. Securely set in a sought-after complex with a lift and dedicated parking, it's a short stroll to the lakefront, gondola and the buzz of town — a dream lock-and-leave or premium holiday let.

title: Modern Three-Bedroom Townhouse Near the Waikato River
description: Freshly built and finished to a high standard, this townhouse offers light, open living, a designer kitchen with island, and a private deck for weekend barbecues. Internal-access garaging, double glazing and full insulation make it warm and effortless, and the river path, university and Hamilton East village are all close by.

title: Substantial Family Residence in Blue-Ribbon Fendalton
description: Behind a mature, private garden, this established brick home delivers generous formal and casual living, a sun-filled conservatory and four double bedrooms. Zoned for highly sought-after schools and a short drive from Merivale's boutiques, it offers space, address and enduring appeal in one of the city's finest pockets.

title: Cosy Furnished Studio Steps from Victoria University
description: Tucked into a quiet Kelburn street with handy bus links and the cable car nearby, this tidy furnished studio is ideal for a student or single professional. It's warm, sunny and ready to move into, with a compact kitchenette and its own bathroom — campus is a five-minute walk.

title: Elegant Weatherboard Home in Prized Remuera
description: Set on a sunny, elevated site within the double grammar zone, this character weatherboard home combines period elegance with a renovated kitchen and seamless flow to established, north-facing grounds. With five bedrooms, off-street parking and Remuera village a short walk away, it's a rare offering on a tightly held street.

title: Tidy Room in a Sunny North Dunedin Student Flat
description: A warm, double room available in a well-kept flat a short walk from the University of Otago and the hospital. The flat is fully insulated with a heat pump in the lounge, has a recently updated kitchen, and comes with high-speed internet included — perfect for a student starting the new semester.
